{{Infobox character
| name = Meia
| parents = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]], [[Yala the High Mason|Yala]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[alchemical glue]], [[shears]], alchemically strengthened hands, rend steel with her teeth, blue scales that aid in healing wounds, short claws, harden her fingernails into claws, Deepstrider's healing ability, restructuring her nails and bones via a Shadeshifter formula}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Consultant]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, [[Gardener]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, [[Blackwatch Guild Head|Guild Head]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alchemist's Guild|Guild of Alchemists]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, Shera's team}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Consultant]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, [[Gardener]], alchemist}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, interrogator}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gray Island]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Meia Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Meia is a blond-haired warrior and trained assassin who serves as a [[Consultant]]. She possesses significant alchemical enhancements that grant her superhuman physical capabilities, including the ability to leap great distances, land softly like a cat, and move with unnatural strength. These augmentations manifest physically through shifting muscles beneath her skin, claws that extend from her fingernails, and eyes that change from blue to a glowing [[Kameira orange]]. As a [[Soulbound]], her internal power is described as having the intensity of many Kameiras, and she can manifest glowing orange blades to combat enemies. In combat, Meia utilizes a variety of tools and weapons, including shears, a thick knife, poisoned darts, smoke grenades, and explosive charges. She is also capable of using her own blood to draw ritualistic symbols. Her attire varies between functional black clothing with a mask and [[veil]], or tribal-style [[Izyrian]] garments designed for blending into crowds. Throughout her various roles, she has acted as an investigator for the [[Guilds]], a combatant against [[Elders]] and [[Elderspawn]], and has even been taken as a hostage by [[Calder]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Meia]] is a blind [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Raised on the [[Gray Island]], Meia is a stubborn [[Kameira]] and the eldest of three [[Gardeners-in-training]] who believes deeply in the [[Consultants]]. As a [[Consultant]] in the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]], she possesses an alchemically reinforced body and uses shears as a weapon, even leaping from a window to be caught by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. During her first official [[Guild]] mission, she led a team of [[Shepherds]] and [[Masons]] to retrieve the [[Heart]] from a crypt. While fighting in an underground arena, she was tasked with occupying the [[Champion]], [[Urzaia Woodsman]], and faced off against an [[Izyrian gladiator]]. Despite her deadly combat skills and various alchemical enhancements, such as the ability to restructure her bones or harden her nails into claws, she eventually sought shelter behind [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]] while nursing a slow-healing wound. After waking with her arms tied to a ship's mast, she set her sights on returning to the [[Gray Island]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">54</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] believes the mission is more important than [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is an individual whose mother [[Shera]] might need to kill as part of a plan.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] can lead an expedition against the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a person [[Shera]] almost got killed in the past.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is the oldest of the three [[Gardeners-in-training]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a character who possesses alchemical glue.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] was raised on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] believes in the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a student described as stubborn with a fragile ego.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a character who leaps from the window and is caught by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a [[Gardener]] and leads a team consisting of [[Shepherds]], [[Masons]], and herself.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has [[Kameira]] in her blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] uses shears as weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is the daughter of [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has alchemically strengthened hands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has eyes like a [[dragon]]'s.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] can rend [[steel]] with her teeth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]'s eyes can blaze orange.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] possesses blue scales that aid in healing wounds.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a person who has sustained acid burns and other injuries.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a person who has the heart of a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has short claws.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] retrieved the [[Heart]] from the crypt.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] fought [[Kameira]] hybrid guard dogs.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a member of the team that completed their first official [[Guild]] mission.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]'s body is alchemically reinforced.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] consumes potions monthly to facilitate her growth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is part of the group that [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] spend their time with.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a deadly fighter.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] fought an [[Izyrian gladiator]] in an underground arena.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a fighter who uses a shear in combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is looking for [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is someone [[Lucan]] considers when thinking through a situation.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] was supposed to lure the [[Champion]], [[Urzaia Woodsman]], into the [[arena]] and keep him occupied.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] can harden her fingernails into claws.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] possesses a Deepstrider's healing ability.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has a [[Nightwyrm]] inside her.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has blue scales that gather around torn flesh at her shoulder.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] in the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]'s abilities include restructuring her nails and bones via a [[Shadeshifter]] formula.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]'s wounds are healed by a potion of [[Deepstrider blood]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is immune to most poisons due to [[Nightwyrm]] venom doses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]'s power contains the [[essence]] of several [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] possesses strength given to her as a gift by a team of skilled alchemists.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is limping to shelter behind [[Shera]] and [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has a blue-scaled shoulder wound that is slow to heal.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has enhanced power with drawbacks.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] wears black clothing and a mask.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has blond hair and orange-burning eyes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] almost attacked [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] woke up with her arms tied to the mast of a ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] intends to return to the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Meia is a blond-haired [[Consultant]] known to [[Calder]] and [[Lucan]], often seen wearing tight black clothing. After the survivors of [[The Eternal]] were rescued, she vanished and remained unseen by [[Calder]] throughout his entire voyage to the [[Capital]]. During her time as a character on [[The Testament]], she displayed the ability to fight [[Urzaia]] and possessed orange eyes that would occasionally blink with an orange light. Her physical nature includes retractable claws and blue scales that appear irregularly over her skin. Though she is a [[Guild]]-mate of [[Lucan]] and an alchemist in recovery, she was later found injured and faced suspicion of lying.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] has blond hair and wears tight black clothes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a character on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] who vanished after the survivors of [[The Eternal]] were rescued.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] whom [[Calder]] has not seen for the entire voyage to the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] with orange eyes and blond hair who can fight [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]]'s eyes blink orange for a fraction of a second.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] has claws that extend and retract from her nails.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is suspected of lying.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is an injured woman with blond hair and orange eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] has blue scales that pop up irregularly over her skin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] wears a black uniform.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is a person known to [[Calder]] and [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] is an alchemist in recovery and a [[Guild]]-mate of [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Meia is a pale-skinned [[Gardener]] with short blond hair and orange, vertically slitted eyes who serves on [[Shera]]'s team. A dedicated follower of the rules, she approaches situations with specific plans and utilizes alchemical smoke grenades, explosive charges, and poisoned darts. Her body features surgically inserted [[Kameira]] instincts that allow her fingers to sprout claws. During [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s display of power, she watched from a nearby roof, but she later went missing in action. Following the [[Reading]], Meia acted ferally as her alchemical enhancements called for blood, and she screamed during a vision where she stood to [[Shera]]'s right. Before the conclusion of events, she warned [[Shera]] that [[Calder]] was coming for her personally and was the final person to kneel.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a member of [[Shera]]'s team and a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a person [[Shera]] compares herself to.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is mentioned as someone who was not present for the conversation with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a person who approaches situations with specific plans.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a character whose fingers can sprout claws.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a [[Gardener]] who carries alchemical smoke grenades, explosive charges, and poisoned darts.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A blond [[Imperial Guard]] woman has orange and vertically slitted eyes like [[Meia]]'s.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] has surgically inserted [[Kameira]] instincts.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a person dedicated to the rules.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a woman with pale skin and short blond hair.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is not a member of [[Calder]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a character who was on a nearby roof during [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s display of power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] stood on one side of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] is a person who was missing in action.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] was to [[Shera]]'s right during the vision.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] screamed during the vision.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] was acting feral after the [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]]'s alchemical enhancements were calling out for blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] warned [[Shera]] that [[Calder]] was coming for her personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]] was the last person to kneel.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|An ally of [[Shera]], Meia is a [[Gardener]] who carries the [[Intent]] of twelve [[Kameira]] within her body. Having become a [[Soulbound]], she utilizes orange shears invested with the ability to see through her enemies. While she possesses blue eyes in reality, she appears in [[Jerri]]'s dreams with orange eyes. During these visions, Meia expresses her skepticism concerning the use of the [[Elders]]' power for protection.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] is an ally of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] has been appearing in [[Jerri]]'s dreams.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] has blue eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|In [[Jerri]]'s dreams, [[Meia]] has orange eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] expresses skepticism regarding relying on the power of the [[Elders]] for protection.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] is a [[Gardener]] with the [[Intent]] of a dozen [[Kameira]] inside her body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] has become a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Meia]] uses orange shears that are invested to see through enemies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Resembling her mother [[Yala]], Meia is a powerful individual capable of carrying [[Shera]]'s share of a battle and possesses the strength to fell trees with a single slap. As a [[Consultant]] and [[Guild Head]], she serves as one of the [[Gardeners]]' most formidable assets, even using a circus net to cushion [[Shera]]'s landing while her eyes turned orange and vertically slitted. During her duties, she acts as an interrogator who takes notes and insisted alongside the [[High Councilors]] that [[Jyrine]] undergo questioning. Meia, who maintains faith in the [[Council of Architects]], eventually emerged into the courtyard with [[Shera]] and attacked the [[Elder]] with glaring orange blades. Following these events, she spoke softly to [[General Teach]] and helped [[Shera]] into a coffin.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">26</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is an individual capable of carrying [[Shera]]'s share of a battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] resembles her mother [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] convinced [[Shera]] and others that [[Calder Marten]] was not directly responsible for [[Lucan]]'s death.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is a [[Consultant]] who used a circus net to cushion [[Shera]]'s landing.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]'s eyes turned orange and vertically slitted.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] has [[Kameira orange]] eyes and clawed arms.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] commands [[Meia]] to exit.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is a character who caught [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] has faith in the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]'s face tightened with the effort of restraining her smile.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is part of the backup team.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is waiting among the crowd below with [[Shera]]'s backup.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] intended to rejoin [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is an interrogator who takes notes during questioning.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] and the [[High Councilors]] insisted that [[Jyrine]] be interrogated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] tells [[Shera]] it is her duty as a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is one of the [[Gardeners]]' biggest guns.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] attacks the [[Elder]] with glaring orange blades.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] emerged into the courtyard with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] caught [[Shera]] to prevent her from crashing into a wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] spoke softly to [[General Teach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] had looked at the [[Regents]]' ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is a person [[Shera]] considers wasting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] has the strength to fell trees with a slap.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] is a [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] helped [[Shera]] into the coffin.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“I’m sorry, Captain,” the Consultant said, from her position on his back.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The full team,” Meia explained, “consists of thirty-three Shepherds, fourteen combat-trained Masons, a dozen sailor Masons to crew the ship, and us.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“You have the heart of a Champion,” he said warmly.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Guard dogs,” Meia snapped. “Kameira hybrids.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“It’s you and me, and maybe Meia, and then the rest of the world.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
